design_decision: Implement client-side expand/pin/copy interactions over static SHA-bound query results; preserve minimal mode and evidence mode separation.

sources.claim: OpenTelemetry logs are designed to enable correlation, filtering, querying, and analysis across telemetry records.
OpenTelemetry trace/log correlation supports navigating from traces to related logs using trace/span context.
Progressive disclosure keeps advanced content secondary to reduce errors and learning burden.
Mobile bottom/detail surfaces are useful for contextual details and controls when implemented with care.
